subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! The Ancient Beauty dwelleth in the Most Great Prison, and twenty handmaids of the Divine… Arise ye in the Cause like unto men. Many are the women regarded today as men in the sight of God, while some of the men have been accounted as women
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز خدا جمال قدم در سجن اعظم مستقر و عشرین نفس از اماء الهی حبا لله با
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @role and station of women
